question: Who composed the song that was performed by a rooster and a hamster in separate animated videos at separate tempos with different lyrics? Answer using the format First name Last name.

research_queries: rooster hamster animated music video song
hamster animated music video different tempo lyrics
rooster hamster cover song original composer
viral animated animal music videos same song
working_plan: Search for animated videos featuring roosters and hamsters singing
Identify the specific song being performed in these videos
Research the original composer of the identified song
Verify the composer's name and format as requested (First name Last name)

solver.reasoning_summary: The song is "Whistle Stop" composed by Roger Miller for Disney's Robin Hood (1973). The rooster performance was Alan-a-Dale (voiced by Roger Miller himself) in the original animated film. The hamster performance was "The Hampsterdance Song" (2000), which used a sped-up sample of "Whistle Stop" with different lyrics and tempo. Wikipedia confirms Roger Miller as both composer and original performer of "Whistle Stop".

Annotator Metadata.Steps:
1. Searched "song performed by rooster and hamster" on Google.
2. Opened https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Hampsterdance_Song.
3. Noted the song "Whistle Stop" was the original to use the tune.
4. Followed the link to https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Robin_Hood_(1973_film).
5. Found the composer of "Whistle Stop".
